content: The 2024-2025 generation of state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be repurposed to fix a core flaw of curiosity-driven reinforcement learning methods like ICM and RND: unproductive 'novelty chasing' in unstructured open environments. This insight frames the active memory system not just as a storage tool, but as a dynamic 'curiosity curator' that filters novel observations to prioritize only those that advance long-horizon task learning.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
